title: Kattali Textile Limited (KTL)
description: Kattali Textile Limited (KTL) is a leading, eco-friendly textile exporter and garment manufacturer based in Bangladesh, established in 2002. They specialize in premium woven and knit garments, including t-shirts, ladies shirts, chino pants, dresses, outerwear, denim products, and kidswear. KTL emphasizes ethical and sustainable manufacturing practices, holding certifications such as Nirapon, Better Work, Walmart Green, and Sedex. With over 20 years of experience, state-of-the-art facilities, a skilled workforce of over 1,200 employees, and an annual production capacity of 360,000 dozen/year, they are a trusted partner for international brands seeking reliable textile sourcing. Their strategic location in Chittagong provides direct access to the port for efficient global delivery to markets including the USA, EU, and Canada.
